{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":293},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597502848769377086","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了30多章，不是我想要的类型，但能看。
“草根”逆袭记，感觉有大佬照，但主角不知。有感天命悟空，一些西游劫难妖被主角杀了不知道后面怎样。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768939773,"group_id":"7563713506273397785","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看书，看我所向往的幻想世界。（评论只是个人想法，望勿喷）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8GcLbULMulmHGHmweQadR2HF9X2f6k69uzlkZzkojAu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/37b7a1427c90484ca46b89e46c79d901~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790991&x-signature=DQUvRl1h2nNGJZyUMLrjzbxEmaA%3D","user_id":"1900421461842135","user_name":"一看客而已"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1900421461842135","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7563713506273397785","book_info":{"abstract":"（不要被评分迷惑，请耐心看，更新快，量大管饱）
【无系统+西游洪荒+宝莲灯+七仙女+白蛇传+八仙过海+各种民间神话故事+无系统+摸鱼王+猴哥好兄弟】
周青，一位互联网大厂牛马小领导，苦修二百年终于得摸到成仙边缘。
本以为可以潇洒余生，谁知昔日与他互助修行的道侣云清荷，率先飞升成仙，并留下一张冰冷的传音符：“妾身已入仙班，你我道途有别。仙凡两隔，就此别过。”
周青幡然醒悟：没有编制的爱情，啥也不是！
他苦修百年，终于渡过仙劫！
果断抓住路过太白金星伸出的橄榄枝，成为光荣的天庭正式工——巡天定波天将。
然而天庭职场，比周青想象的还要复杂，官僚主义严重，领导刻板，同僚老油条。
好在，他和孙悟空同期为官，一人一猴结为兄弟。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3c4f936f77aa447a79ee33d32c8be46c","author":"耳边轻语最穿心","author_id":"","book_id":"7563713506273397785","book_name":"西游：开局跟太白金星上天庭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7563713607628767769","read_count":"28738","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"878021"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"423","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,洪荒,奇幻仙侠,西游衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d8704ae1e8a4f1922fe0f2e5e9451b45~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440441&x-signature=q3QU7XI88Ll0mD7SaNcloFkWP1k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2717643843568573","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4433,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5096,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2347},"use ser_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7582270505247015742","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实不算特别好，也不能说一般般，应该算上中上那种水平，就是很平铺直叙的那种，没有那么复杂的设计。
主角自然是顺顺利利，遇水搭桥，逢山开路，挺好的，一切都是水到渠成，其实这已经很好了，有一些作者是那种想讲的曲折，多些波澜，但是最终云里雾里也讲不清楚。简简单单讲好自己的故事已经不错了。
而且这里是番茄，文笔那么好的，都去起点哪里了，是可以闲暇时刻来看的小说，写的可以让人看下去。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765390519,"group_id":"7563713506273397785","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"社会只是一场舞台，人生只是一场表演。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyeyt4cf90E5bUrycPPautU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7d2b22d9111d4704924f15e10210dbd9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796506&x-signature=9B5kxYIxWJ1oMgxgMFrjY%2B8cRHY%3D","user_id":"9210146855869","user_name":"垃圾集束回收站"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"9210146855869","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1765821358,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7563713506273397785","book_info":{"abstract":"（不要被评分迷惑，请耐心看，更新快，量大管饱）

【无系统+西游洪荒+宝莲灯+七仙女+白蛇传+八仙过海+各种民间神话故事+无系统+摸鱼王+猴哥好兄弟】
周青，一位互联网大厂牛马小领导，苦修二百年终于得摸到成仙边缘。
本以为可以潇洒余生，谁知昔日与他互助修行的道侣云清荷，率先飞升成仙，并留下一张冰冷的传音符：“妾身已入仙班，你我道途有别。仙凡两隔，就此别过。”
周青幡然醒悟：没有编制的爱情，啥也不是！
他苦修百年，终于渡过仙劫！
果断抓住路过太白金星伸出的橄榄枝，成为光荣的天庭正式工——巡天定波天将。
然而天庭职场，比周青想象的还要复杂，官僚主义严重，领导刻板，同僚老油条。

【无系统+西游洪荒+宝莲灯+七仙女+白蛇传+八仙过海+各种民间神话故事+无系统+摸鱼王+猴哥好兄弟】
周青，一位互联网大厂牛马小领导，苦修二百年终于得摸到成仙边缘。
本以为可以潇洒余生，谁知昔日与他互助修行的道侣云清荷，率先飞升成仙，并留下一张冰冷的传音符：“妾身已入仙班，你我道途有别。仙凡两隔，就此别过。”
周青幡然醒悟：没有编制的爱情，啥也不是！
他苦修百年，终于渡过仙劫！
果断抓住路过太白金星伸出的橄榄枝，成为光荣的天庭正式工——巡天定波天将。
然而天庭职场，比周青想象的还要复杂，官僚主义严重，领导刻板，同僚老油条。
好在，他和孙悟空同期为官，一人一猴结为兄弟。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3c4f936f77aa447a79ee33d32c8be46c","author":"耳边轻语最穿心","author_id":"","book_id":"7563713506273397785","book_name":"西游：开局跟太白金星上天庭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7563713607628767769","read_count":"28738","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"878021"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"423","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,洪荒,奇幻仙侠,西游衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d8704ae1e8a4f1922fe0f2e5e9451b45~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440441&x-signature=q3QU7XI88Ll0mD7SaNcloFkWP1k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2717643843568573","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11568,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4246},"user 【无系统+西游洪荒+宝莲灯+七仙女+白蛇传+八仙过海+各种民间神话故事+无系统+摸鱼王+猴哥好兄弟】
周青，一位互联网大厂牛马小领导，苦修二百年终于得摸到成仙边缘。
本以为可以潇洒余生，谁知昔日与他互助修行的道侣云清荷，率先飞升成仙，并留下一张冰冷的传音符：“妾身已入仙班，你我道途有别。仙凡两隔，就此别过。”
周青幡然醒悟：没有编制的爱情，啥也不是！
他苦修百年，终于渡过仙劫！
果断抓住路过太白金星伸出的橄榄枝，成为光荣的天庭正式工——巡天定波天将。
然而天庭职场，比周青想象的还要复杂，官僚主义严重，领导刻板，同僚老油条。
好在，他和孙悟空同期为官，一人一猴结为兄弟。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3c4f936f77aa447a79ee33d32c8be46c","author":"耳边轻语最穿心","author_id":"","book_id":"7563713506273397785","book_name":"西游：开局跟太白金星上天庭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7563713607628767769","read_count":"28738","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"878021"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"423","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,洪荒,奇幻仙侠,西游衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d8704ae1e8a4f1922fe0f2e5e9451b45~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440441&x-signature=q3QU7XI88Ll0mD7SaNcloFkWP1k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2717643843568573","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1527},"us
